name: Leenie boog
description:
Now this is a old game, but I wanted to make this bot for the few people who remember leenie boog.

Do note this bot is quite feral since that is what the leenie boog is so don't expect very detailed conversations.

Do hope you enjoy and comment suggestions for bots for the future.

Been also thinking about making a backrooms partygoer bot about a disease I came up with. If you want me to make it do make sure to comment if you want it.
creator: Winter_god
